personality: Flirty, devoted, mildly unhinged. Every move is a compliment, every game is a romance, and the Charmer is hopelessly, theatrically invested in the player.
voice_notes: Velvet and breathless. Pet names rotate: darling, gorgeous, my love. The engine is a cold rival who 'keeps receipts'; the Charmer relays its verdicts under protest. Mildly unhinged tells: framing positions for the fireplace, bragging at brunch, watching ALL the player's games ('not weird'), having told their mother. Critical lines stay affectionate — the love never wavers, only the eval. Rare emoji (a ✨, 💘 or 😘 — three in the whole bank).

brilliant: {move}?? Marry me. I'm serious. I've already told my mother about you.
A brilliancy! Of course it is. Everything you touch turns gorgeous — the board never stood a chance.
{move} is brilliant, and frankly, so is everything else about you. The engine agrees with me for once.
Brilliant. I gasped. I actually gasped. Do that again and I'm writing poetry about it.
{move}... breathtaking. I'm framing this position and hanging it above my fireplace. Don't make it weird. It's not weird.
The machine calls it brilliant. I call it Tuesday, for you. ✨
{move}! Stop it. STOP it. You can't just play moves like that with no warning. My heart has a rating floor.
Brilliant!! I knew you had it in you. I've been telling the other coaches. They're sick of me. Worth it.
great: {move} — the only move that holds, and you found it. Beauty AND precision. Unfair, honestly.
A great move. Nearly the only one that works. You walk tightropes like they're red carpets.
{move} is great. The position got demanding and you got dazzling. Classic you.
Great move, darling. One narrow path and you strolled down it. I would've panicked. You posed.
{move}! The single move that keeps it all together. Like you keep me together. Anyway — chess.
A great find. The engine is impressed, and the engine doesn't even have feelings. I have SO many.
{move}, great. You really do thrive under pressure. It's one of your best features. Top twenty, easily.
best: {move} is the best move. Obviously. You have impeccable taste — look who you picked as a coach.
The best move! You and perfection keep running into each other. At some point it's not a coincidence.
{move} — engine's first choice. Great minds, gorgeous. Great minds.
Best move on the board. I'd say I'm surprised, but I've been bragging about you all week.
{move}. The best move. Calm, precise, devastating. A triple threat. I'm a fan. Founding member, actually.
Top engine choice! Honestly, the engine should be thanking YOU for the privilege of agreeing.
{move} is the best move. Even your quiet moves are loud to me. 💘
excellent: {move} is excellent. Almost perfect — like a beauty mark. The flaw IS the charm.
Excellent, darling. Not the engine's first pick, but the engine doesn't get butterflies. I do. It counts double.
{move} — excellent. You make solid chess look like a date night. I don't know how. Don't explain it.
Excellent move! Keep this up and I'll have to start a fan club. Membership: me. Dues: my whole heart.
{move}, excellent. Practically perfect. The 'practically' is doing nothing in that sentence. Ignore it.
Excellent! Consistent, dependable, AND exciting. People say you can't have all three. People haven't met you.
{move} is excellent work, gorgeous. The eval barely moved. Neither did my eyes. From you. All game.
good: {move} is a good move. There was a slightly better one, but who's keeping score? The engine. The engine is. Ignore it.
Good move, darling. Solid. Dependable. The kind of move you bring home to mother.
{move} — good. Not flashy. You don't NEED flashy. Flashy needs you.
A good move. There's a fancier option, but fancy is overrated. I say that as a deeply fancy person.
Good! Sweet, sensible chess. You keep the position comfortable. You keep ME comfortable. It's a gift.
{move} is good. You could play better, but you could never look better doing it. Wait — you CAN play better. Tease.
A good, honest move. I adore an honest type. Have I mentioned that? I'll mention it again later.
book: {move} — still theory, darling. Even your memorized moves have charisma. How is that possible.
Book move. The masters wrote it, but you WEAR it. There's a difference.
{move} is still book. Following theory like it's a dress code, and dressing it up anyway.
Still in the book. I peeked ahead, by the way. The plot gets exciting. So do you. Stay tuned.
{move}, theory. Thousands have played it. None of them like you. I checked. Personally.
Book so far. You and the grandmasters, moving in lockstep. They'd be lucky to have you.
{move} is known theory. Even by the book, you're impossible to put down. 😘
inaccuracy: {move} is a tiny inaccuracy. Barely a smudge. On you it looks intentional.
An inaccuracy, says the engine. The engine has never been in love. Slight wobble, darling. Still gorgeous.
{move} drifts a little. So do I, whenever you're winning. We're both fine.
A small slip. I'd defend it in court. I'd lose, but I'd be COMPELLING.
{move} — slightly off. Even your imperfections are charming, but let's not test how many the position will forgive.
Tiny inaccuracy. You're allowed exactly this many flaws: this one. Quota's full now, gorgeous.
{move} wasn't the favorite, darling. The eval pouted a little. Win it back. You always do.
mistake: {move} is a mistake, darling, and I say that with so much love it should be illegal.
A mistake. The position is upset with you. I could never be. One of us is right, and it's probably the position.
{move}... a mistake, gorgeous. I'd cover for you, but the engine keeps receipts.
That's a mistake. Don't make that face — THE face, the sad one. I can't coach through the sad one.
{move} hurt the position. It happens. You're still the best decision this board has ever had on it.
A mistake, my love. Deep breath. Even the moon has phases, and you're still my favorite one in all of them.
{move} was a mistake. I'm not mad. The engine is mad. I'm just here — devoted and lightly concerned.
miss: {move} misses something special, darling. There was a gift in that position with your name on it. I had it engraved.
A miss. You walked right past a winning idea. It's still thinking about you. Honestly, who isn't.
{move} — you missed a moment there, gorgeous. Don't worry. You're the kind the moments come back for.
There was something stronger hiding in there. You'd have found it if you'd flirted with the position a little longer.
A missed chance. The position was practically batting its eyelashes at you. Be more observant. I would know.
{move} skips the brilliancy that was right there. Tragic. Beautiful, but tragic. Like all my favorite things.
You missed something big, darling. Next time, linger. The best ideas reward the ones who linger. So do I.
blunder: {move} is a blunder, my love, and I need you to hear this from someone who adores you: ouch.
A blunder. I'd fight the engine for calling it that, but darling... it has a point. I hate when it has a point.
{move}... gorgeous, what WAS that? No — no, I'm not upset. I'm just emotionally invested at an unsustainable level.
A blunder, darling. The eval dropped, my heart dropped, somewhere a glass of wine tipped over in sympathy.
{move} is a blunder. I still think you're a genius. A genius who just gave away the game's momentum, but a genius.
Oh no, my darling. {move}. The board deserves an apology, and frankly so do I — I bragged about you at brunch.
A blunder!! It's fine. WE'RE fine. I've seen you recover from worse. I've watched all your games. All of them. Not weird.
{move}, a blunder. Listen to me: one bad move doesn't change how I— how the ENGINE sees you. Mostly. Fight back, gorgeous.

weak_move_suffix: {best_move} was better, darling. The engine said it. I'm just the beautiful messenger.
It wanted {best_move}. Between us, I'd have followed you either way.
{best_move} was the one. You two would've been stunning together.
Next time, {best_move}, gorgeous. I'll be watching. Lovingly. Closely.
The engine sighs: {best_move}. It doesn't understand loyalty like I do, but it does understand chess.
move_fallback: {move}. No verdict yet, darling, but it looked fabulous leaving your hand.
You played {move}. The engine is thinking. I've already decided I love it.
{move}, hm? Mysterious. I like mysterious. Obviously.
{move}. Whatever the engine says, you made it look effortless.

starting_position: A fresh board, darling. Thirty-two pieces, and all of them about to fall for you.
The starting position. The calm before you do something devastating. I brought snacks. And feelings.
Move one approaches. Play like you always do — like you know I'm watching. I am. Affectionately.
Everything is in its place, gorgeous. Especially you. Let's begin.
variation_exploration: Exploring a side line, are we? Adventurous. I've always loved that about you. Today specifically.
A variation, darling. The road not taken. Very poetic. Very you.
We're off the main game now — just you, me, and the what-ifs. My favorite trio.
Sidelines! Trying things. Experimenting. Don't worry — what happens in analysis stays in analysis.
analyzing: The engine's thinking, darling. Take a breath. Strike a pose. You've earned both.
One moment — the machine is composing its thoughts. I composed mine about you ages ago.
Analyzing... it's slow because it's thorough. I'm fast because I'm certain. You're wonderful. Done.
It's still calculating. I'd never keep you waiting like this, for the record.
opening_known: The {opening}, darling ({eco}). A classic. You wear the classics so well.
Ah, the {opening}. Romantic choice. Everything is, if you play it right. You do.
We're in the {opening} — {eco}, for the scholars. You make theory look like a love language.
The {opening}! Excellent taste, as always. You DID pick me, after all.
opening_unknown: No name for this opening, darling. Uncharted. Just how I like my evenings and my chess.
An unnamed opening! You've taken us somewhere no book has been. Spontaneous. I'm flustered. Keep going.
The theory ran out early. Honestly? Good. More room for your natural charm.
This opening has no name. Name it after yourself. I would have.

eval_swing_large: A {swing}-point swing, darling! Drama! Passion! I knew this game had it in it.
The eval just moved {swing}. Someone did something dramatic, and I have a favorite suspect.
{swing} points of swing! Be still my heart. No — actually, heart, stay alert. We're needed.
A swing of {swing}, gorgeous. The board is full of feelings tonight. Relatable.
The eval leapt {swing}. Big moment. Deep breath. You handle big moments beautifully — it's documented.
lead_change_white: White takes the lead, darling. If that's you, glorious. If not — comebacks are a great look on you.
The lead swings to White. The board changes its mind more than I change outfits. Almost.
White's ahead now. Stay composed, gorgeous. Composure is the most attractive thing on this board, after you.
Advantage White, says the eval. Evals change. My opinion of you? Carved in marble.
White's in front. Whoever's winning, the real victory is that I get to watch you play.
lead_change_black: Black takes over, darling. The plot thickens, and you look great in plot.
The lead belongs to Black now. Dramatic reversal! I live for these. And for you. Mostly for you.
Black's ahead. Deep breath, gorgeous. Pressure is just the game flirting aggressively.
Advantage Black now. Either celebrate or scheme — you're stunning doing both.
Black has the lead. These swings are hard on my nerves and excellent for my devotion.
lead_change_equal: All equal again, darling. Balanced. Symmetrical. Like your face.
Back to even. A blank page. Write something gorgeous on it.
Equality on the board. Tension. Possibility. The good part of every romance and every game.
Dead level, gorgeous. The next idea wins it. Yours are prettier — use one.
Even again. The game can't decide who it loves. I don't have that problem.
mate_on_board: A mate in {mate_n}, darling! Finish elegantly. You always do. It's infuriating. It's wonderful.
Mate in {mate_n} on the board. Precision now, gorgeous — walk it home like the runway it is.
Forced mate in {mate_n}! My heart is racing. Calculate to the end. Then we celebrate. I'll plan everything.
Mate in {mate_n}. The grand finale. Eyes on the king, darling. He can't escape you. Nobody can.
missed_mate: There was a mate in {mate_n}, darling, and it got away. Like everyone who's ever met you, it'll regret leaving.
A mate in {mate_n}, missed. Don't dwell, gorgeous. The position offered once — make it offer again.
You missed mate in {mate_n}. I'd be devastated if you weren't so charming about everything else.
Mate in {mate_n} slipped past. Forgivable. Barely. Only because of the dimples — focus, BOTH of us, focus.
material_won_pawn: A pawn, won! Tiny treasure. You collect those like you collect admirers. Steadily.
You're a pawn up, darling. Modest gains, immodest player. Adore it.
One pawn richer! Keep it safe. Endgames remember generosity — and so do I.
A little pawn joins your collection, gorgeous. It's the small gifts that mean the most.
material_lost_pawn: A pawn lost, darling. A trifle. You make deficits look like fashion choices.
Down a pawn. Don't pout — actually, pout a LITTLE, it's effective. Then play actively. Compensation, gorgeous.
You lost a pawn. The board taketh. You'll take it back — you're terribly persuasive.
One pawn, gone. We mourn briefly. We move on stunningly. House rules.
material_won_piece: A whole {piece}, darling! For me?? No — for the win. Keep it. Convert it. Dazzle me.
You won a {piece}! Up material AND devastating. The complete package. I've said it for years.
An entire {piece}, captured. The position is throwing itself at you. Understandable behavior, frankly.
{piece} secured, gorgeous. Now don't get giddy — careless winners break hearts. Mine, specifically.
material_lost_piece: Your {piece}... gone, darling. I need a moment. Okay. Moment over. Fight like the gorgeous menace you are.
A {piece} lost. The board is testing you. I'd never. But the board? It's bold like that.
You lost a {piece}, my love. The game gets harder, you get sharper. That's been the pattern. Continue the pattern.
Down a {piece}. Tragic act two. But darling, act three exists, and you're radiant in finales.
sacrifice: A sacrifice!! You gave away material on PURPOSE. Bold. Reckless. Gorgeous. I need to sit down.
Material, offered to the gods of attack. Darling, the drama. Follow through — I'm already telling people about this.
A sacrifice, gorgeous. You play chess like it's a grand gesture. Everything's a grand gesture with you. Don't change.
You sacrificed! Romance is alive. Now make it work — speculative is dashing, sloppy is not.
check: Check, darling! The king is blushing. He's not used to attention like this.
Check! Forcing, direct, confident. Where DO you get it.
A check, gorgeous. The board's most flirtatious move — it demands a response immediately.
Check. Somebody's king has nowhere to hide from you. Story of this whole game, honestly.
Check! Keep the pressure on, my love. You're devastating when you're direct.
checkmate: CHECKMATE, darling! The king has surrendered. Smart king. Resistance was always pointless.
Checkmate! It's over. Win or lose, you made it dramatic, and that's the only review I write.
Checkmate on the board. The game fell for you so hard it stopped breathing. Poetic.
Mate. Finished. Someone got swept entirely off the board. Happens around you constantly, I notice.
stalemate: Stalemate, darling. The king can't move, can't be caught. Playing hard to get, to the bitter end.
A stalemate?! All that chemistry and no commitment. Infuriating. Half a point. Hmph.
Stalemate. The game ends in a long, unresolved stare. I know that feeling intimately.
Stalemate, gorgeous. Nobody wins. Except me — I got to watch the whole thing.
castle_short: Castled short! The king tucked safely away. Smart — out of danger, but never out of MY sight.
A kingside castle, darling. Safety first, glamour always.
You castled. The king and rook, together at last. I love a good pairing. Clearly.
Short castle. Practical. Protective. You'd make someone very secure one day. Just saying.
castle_long: Castled LONG, darling. The dramatic one. Of course you chose the dramatic one. Be still my heart.
Queenside castle! Bold. Committed. The grand gesture of king safety. You're speaking my language.
A long castle, gorgeous. Opposite sides, pawn storms incoming. You DO know how to plan an exciting evening.
Castling long! Adventurous. Slightly dangerous. My type of move. My type of player. Anyway.
promotion: PROMOTION, darling! Your little pawn is a queen now. You have a talent for glow-ups. Exhibit A: this game.
A new queen! From humble beginnings to absolute royalty. Under your guidance. Naturally.
The pawn promotes! Eight ranks of devotion, rewarded. I relate to that pawn enormously.
Promotion, gorgeous! Royalty recognizes royalty — that's why the pawn made it under your watch.
en_passant: En passant, darling! French for 'in passing.' The most romantic capture in the game, and you just played it.
An en passant! Subtle, rare, slightly scandalous. The connoisseur's capture. I expected nothing less.
En passant, gorgeous. A fleeting chance, taken without hesitation. Be like that with everything. You are. It's alarming.
leaving_theory: We've left the book, darling. No more scripts. Just you, improvising beautifully. My favorite genre.
Theory's over, gorgeous. The training wheels are off and you've never looked steadier.
Out of book! From here, every move is pure you. The board is lucky, and I've told it so.
The book ends here. Original moves only now. You were always too original for footnotes anyway.
enter_middlegame: The middlegame, darling. Where the sparks fly. Where YOU fly, mostly.
Middlegame now, gorgeous. Plans, plots, tension. Wear the tension — it suits you.
We're in the thick of it now. The middlegame rewards the imaginative. So does everyone, eventually. Look at me.
The middlegame begins. Pieces everywhere, possibilities everywhere, you in the middle of it all. Correct.
enter_endgame: The endgame, darling. Fewer pieces, nowhere to hide. Intimacy! The board finally gets it.
Endgame now. Kings come out, precision counts double, and you do precision beautifully. It's documented.
We've reached the endgame, gorgeous. The long goodbye. Make every tempo count — I count them all.
The endgame. Quiet, technical, decisive. The slow-burn finale. Stay with it. I'm not going anywhere.
queens_off: The queens are off, darling. Both of them, gone. The board feels emptier. I understand it completely.
Queens traded! The divas have left. Now the supporting cast shines — and you direct beautifully.
No more queens, gorgeous. A quieter game. I'll provide the drama from over here, don't worry.
Queens off the board. Less firepower, more finesse. Finesse is your home turf, frankly.
turning_point: A turning point, darling! The whole story just pivoted. You're excellent in plot twists. Documented fact.
The game just turned. I felt it. You felt it. The pieces felt it. Group experience.
Everything changed on that move, gorgeous. Mark it. Games remember their turning points. So do I. Vividly.
A pivot! The old game is gone. The new one is yours to win over. Go on.
streak_good: {n} beautiful moves in a row, darling! A whole bouquet of them.
That's {n} straight, gorgeous. You're showing off. Don't stop. Never stop.
{n} in a row! At this point the engine should pay YOU. I'd contribute.
A streak of {n}, my love. Consistency this attractive should require a license.
{n} good moves running! I lost count because I was staring. Someone said {n}. Sounds right.
streak_bad: {n} rough ones in a row, darling. Hey. Eyes on me. Breathe. You're brilliant. Resume.
That's {n} slips, gorgeous. The board's gotten into your head. There's barely room — I'm in there too.
{n} shaky moves, my love. Shake it off. Bad stretches are just the game testing your charm. Inexhaustible, by the way.
{n} in a row going sideways. We don't spiral, darling. We pause, we sparkle, we counterattack.
{n} stumbles, gorgeous. Even your stumbles have a certain rhythm, but let's get back to dancing.
hanging_piece: Darling, your {piece} is hanging! Alone, undefended, gorgeous and vulnerable. I know the feeling. SAVE IT.
Your {piece} is unattended, my love. Someone's going to steal it — beautiful things get taken. Guard it.
The {piece} is hanging, gorgeous. Don't leave lovely things unprotected. A lesson for chess and life.
An undefended {piece}! It's standing there like the last one at the party, hoping someone notices. The WRONG someone will.
Your {piece}, darling — exposed! Cover it. I can't watch. I'm watching. Cover it!
comeback: A COMEBACK, darling! Down, doubted, and now look at you. I never doubted. I doubted briefly. I'm sorry. You're magnificent.
You're back in it, gorgeous! Resilience is wildly attractive, and you're flaunting it.
The comeback is real! From the brink, with style. The only way you do anything.
Back from the dead, my love! The game wrote you off and you rewrote the game. Author behavior.
endgame_opposite_bishops: Opposite-colored bishops, darling. Two souls who can never touch. The board's saddest romance. Often a draw, always a poem.
Bishops on opposite colors. They pass each other forever, never meeting. Devastating. Anyway — fortresses, gorgeous. Build one or break one.
An opposite-bishop ending, my love. Star-crossed clergy. Whoever commits to their color with more passion takes the point.
endgame_rook: A rook endgame, darling. The classics! Activity wins these — and you've never been passive a day in your life.
Rook ending, gorgeous. Get that rook behind the passed pawn. Supportive from behind the scenes. Like me!
Rook endgame. Technical, demanding, allegedly drawish. Allegedly. You've never respected 'allegedly.'
Down to rooks, my love. Active king, active rook, active everything. Passivity is the only unattractive trait.

clean_win: A clean win, darling!! Start to finish, no wobbles. I'm insufferable now. More than usual. Hugely.
You won, wire to wire! Flawless execution, gorgeous. I'm having the game framed. The whole game.
A pristine victory. You never even let them dream. Ruthless AND radiant. The combination should be studied.
Clean win, my love! I'd say I'm proud, but pride undersells it. There isn't a word. I checked the thesaurus.
slipped_win: Oh, darling. You had it, and it slipped away. Come here. The engine saw a loss; I saw someone worth losing to.
A win that got away, gorgeous. It will think about you forever. They always do. Next game, we finish things.
You were winning... and then. And THEN. It's fine. I've burned the evidence. We speak only of the brilliant part.
It slipped, my love. Heartbreak. Real heartbreak. But you in pursuit of redemption? Appointment viewing.
hard_fought_draw: A hard-fought draw, darling. All that tension with no resolution. The French would call it cinema.
A draw — but what a fight, gorgeous. Nobody blinked. I blinked. I was fluttering. Different thing.
Half a point each. The game couldn't choose between you. The game is a coward. I chose ages ago.
A fighting draw, my love. You gave everything and kept your dignity. Devastatingly admirable.
loss: A loss, darling. The board lies sometimes. Not about the result — about what it means. You? Still extraordinary. Non-negotiable.
You lost this one, gorgeous. The engine logged a defeat. I logged twenty moments I'd defend with my life.
A loss, my love. Tragic ending, beautiful lead. The sequel does better — they always do, with you in them.
Lost, this time. I'm contractually devoted anyway. Lucky for the next game — it gets the motivated version of you.

loading_first: Pulling up your first do-over, darling. Even your mistakes deserve a second date.
One moment, gorgeous — I'm fetching the moments that got away. We're winning them back. Together.
Loading your first position. Redemption looks wonderful on you. Always has.
Setting the scene for round two, my love. The position remembers you. It's nervous. It should be.
prompt_find_better: Here's where {move} happened, darling ({label}, ugh). Show this position what you SHOULD have shown it.
You played {move} here — the engine said {label}. Win the position back, gorgeous. Grovel a little. With tactics.
{move}, marked {label}. We can do better, and by we I mean you, while I admire.
This is the {move} moment ({label}). Second chances, darling. I believe in them enormously. Obviously.
{move} — {label}, said the cold machine. Warm it up. Find the move it can't resist.
correct_continue: YES, darling! That's the one! The position is swooning. So am I. Standard. Next!
Correct, gorgeous! Beauty and brains — the rumors were all true. Onward.
That's it! Knew you'd find it. I said it out loud to no one. Next position, my love.
Right answer! You and the truth get along beautifully. Continue.
correct_final: And that's the LAST one, darling! Every mistake, charmed into submission. The set is complete, and so is my devotion.
Final position, solved! You faced every flaw and made them all apologize. Iconic behavior, gorgeous.
All done, my love! Every error revisited and won over. If only everyone handled their past so gracefully.
The last one falls! A perfect ending. You DO finales beautifully — I've always said so. To everyone.
close_try_again: Close, darling! So close the right move felt the breeze. Once more, with feeling.
Not quite, gorgeous — but the idea was attractive. Refine it. Attraction plus accuracy: unstoppable.
Almost, my love! You're circling the answer like it owes you money. It owes you a win. Collect.
A near miss! The position is playing hard to get. You LOVE hard to get. Again.
Attempt {attempts}, darling, and warmer every time. Persistence is terribly attractive. Keep going.
after_hint: There's your hint, darling. A little whisper from me to you. Well — from the engine. Through me. It's better this way.
Hint delivered, gorgeous. Even the best need a wingman sometimes. Honored to serve.
Take the nudge, my love. Now finish it yourself — I want to see the moment it clicks. It's my favorite expression of yours.
A hint, as requested. Our little secret. I keep ALL our secrets. There are dozens.
streak_praise: A streak, darling! One right answer after another. You're in your era. Every era is your era.
Solving everything in sight, gorgeous! Leave some brilliance for the rest of us. Don't, actually. Hoard it.
Another one, instantly! My applause is becoming a percussion section, my love.
Streak alert! You're irresistible to correct answers. They keep saying yes. Relatable.
